    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:24-56",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def build_and_save_index(\n    project_id: str,\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk],\n    model_name: str,\n    output_dir: str | Path = \"data/index\",\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    \"\"\"Build embeddings and persist FAISS index + chunk metadata.\"\"\"\n\n    _ensure_dependencies()\n    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer\n    import faiss\n\n    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)\n    vectors = model.encode([chunk.content for chunk in chunks], normalize_embeddings=True)\n    index = faiss.IndexFlatIP(vectors.shape[1])\n    index.add(vectors)\n\n    target = Path(output_dir).resolve()\n    target.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    faiss.write_index(index, str(target / f\"{project_id}.faiss\"))\n    (target / f\"{project_id}.chunks.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps([asdict(chunk) for chunk in chunks], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    (target / f\"{project_id}.index.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(\n            {\"project_id\": project_id, \"model_name\": model_name, \"chunk_count\": len(chunks)},\n            ensure_ascii=False,\n            indent=2,\n        ),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return {\"project_id\": project_id, \"chunk_count\": len(chunks), \"model_name\": model_name}",
    "start_line": 24,
    "end_line": 56
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:59-78",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def search_index(\n    project_id: str,\n    query: str,\n    top_k: int,\n    model_name: str,\n    index_dir: str | Path = \"data/index\",\n) -> list[SearchResult]:\n    \"\"\"Search persisted FAISS index using semantic similarity.\"\"\"\n\n    _ensure_dependencies()\n    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer\n    import faiss\n\n    source = Path(index_dir).resolve()\n    index = faiss.read_index(str(source / f\"{project_id}.faiss\"))\n    chunks = _load_chunks(source / f\"{project_id}.chunks.json\")\n    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)\n    query_vector = model.encode([query], normalize_embeddings=True)\n    scores, indices = index.search(query_vector, top_k)\n    return _map_results(scores[0], indices[0], chunks)",
    "start_line": 59,
    "end_line": 78
  },
  {

    "content": "def _load_chunks(path: Path) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    raw_items = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    return [CodeChunk(**item) for item in raw_items]",

  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:86-102",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def _map_results(scores, indices, chunks: list[CodeChunk]) -> list[SearchResult]:\n    results: list[SearchResult] = []\n    for score, idx in zip(scores, indices):\n        if idx < 0 or idx >= len(chunks):\n            continue\n        chunk = chunks[idx]\n        results.append(\n            SearchResult(\n                chunk_id=chunk.chunk_id,\n                relative_path=chunk.relative_path,\n                score=float(score),\n                start_line=chunk.start_line,\n                end_line=chunk.end_line,\n                content=chunk.content,\n            )\n        )\n    return results",
    "start_line": 86,
    "end_line": 102

    "chunk_id": "core/repo_import.py:33-53",
    "relative_path": "core/repo_import.py",
    "content": "def scan_repository_files(\n    root_path: str | Path, ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None\n) -> list[ScannedFile]:\n    \"\"\"Recursively scan files while skipping ignored directories.\"\"\"\n\n    root = Path(root_path).resolve()\n    skip_dirs = ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS\n    files: list[ScannedFile] = []\n\n    for file_path in root.rglob(\"*\"):\n        if not file_path.is_file():\n            continue\n        relative = file_path.relative_to(root).as_posix()\n        parent_parts = Path(relative).parts[:-1]\n        if any(part in skip_dirs for part in parent_parts):\n            continue\n\n        files.append(ScannedFile(path=relative, size=file_path.stat().st_size))\n\n    files.sort(key=lambda item: item.path)\n    return files",
    "start_line": 33,
    "end_line": 53

    "content": "def save_project_metadata(\n    root_path: str | Path,\n    files: list[ScannedFile],\n    output_dir: str | Path = \"data/projects\",\n    ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None,\n) -> ProjectMetadata:\n    \"\"\"Save metadata for an imported project and return the persisted model.\"\"\"\n\n    root = Path(root_path).resolve()\n    skip_dirs = sorted(list(ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS))\n    metadata = ProjectMetadata(\n        project_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n        root_path=root.as_posix(),\n        imported_at=datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n        file_count=len(files),\n        ignored_dirs=skip_dirs,\n    )\n\n    target_dir = Path(output_dir).resolve()\n    target_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    target_file = target_dir / f\"{metadata.project_id}.json\"\n    target_file.write_text(\n        json.dumps(asdict(metadata), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return metadata",
    "start_line": 56,

    "content": "﻿\"\"\"Repository ingestion utilities for codebase indexing.\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Iterable\n\nDEFAULT_IGNORED_DIRS = {\".git\", \"node_modules\", \"build\", \"dist\"}\nDEFAULT_ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = {\".py\", \".ts\", \".js\", \".md\", \".json\"}\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass RepoDocument:\n    \"\"\"A single ingested source document from the repository.\"\"\"\n\n    relative_path: str\n    language: str\n    content: str\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass IngestionError:\n    \"\"\"Captures file-level ingestion failures without stopping the pipeline.\"\"\"\n\n    relative_path: str\n    message: str\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass IngestionResult:\n    \"\"\"The full output of repository ingestion.\"\"\"\n\n    root_path: str\n    documents: list[RepoDocument]\n    errors: list[IngestionError]\n\n\nclass RepoIngestor:\n    \"\"\"Ingest repository files while applying ignore and extension rules.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        ignored_dirs: Iterable[str] | None = None,\n        allowed_extensions: Iterable[str] | None = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        self.ignored_dirs = set(ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_IGNORED_DIRS)\n        self.allowed_extensions = {\n            extension.lower() for extension in (allowed_extensions or DEFAULT_ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS)\n        }\n\n    def ingest(self, root_path: str | Path) -> IngestionResult:\n        root = Path(root_path).resolve()\n        documents: list[RepoDocument] = []\n        errors: list[IngestionError] = []\n\n        for file_path in self._iter_candidate_files(root):\n            relative_path = file_path.relative_to(root).as_posix()\n            try:\n                content = file_path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n            except (UnicodeDecodeError, OSError) as exc:\n                errors.append(IngestionError(relative_path=relative_path, message=str(exc)))\n                continue\n\n            documents.append(\n                RepoDocument(\n                    relative_path=relative_path,\n                    language=self._detect_language(file_path),\n                    content=content,\n                )\n            )\n\n        documents.sort(key=lambda document: document.relative_path)\n        errors.sort(key=lambda error: error.relative_path)\n        return IngestionResult(root_path=root.as_posix(), documents=documents, errors=errors)\n\n    def _iter_candidate_files(self, root: Path) -> Iterable[Path]:\n        for file_path in root.rglob(\"*\"):\n            if not file_path.is_file():\n                continue\n            if self._is_ignored(file_path, root):\n                continue\n            if file_path.suffix.lower() not in self.allowed_extensions:\n                continue\n            yield file_path\n\n    def _is_ignored(self, file_path: Path, root: Path) -> bool:\n        relative_parts = file_path.relative_to(root).parts\n        return any(part in self.ignored_dirs for part in relative_parts[:-1])\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _detect_language(file_path: Path) -> str:\n        suffix = file_path.suffix.lower()\n        if suffix == \".py\":\n            return \"python\"\n        if suffix in {\".ts\", \".js\"}:\n            return \"javascript\"\n        if suffix == \".md\":\n            return \"markdown\"\n        if suffix == \".json\":\n            return \"json\"\n        return \"text\"\n",

    "content": "﻿from pathlib import Path\n\nfrom core.repo_ingestion import RepoIngestor\n\n\ndef _write(path: Path, content: str) -> None:\n    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    path.write_text(content, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n\ndef test_ingest_filters_extensions_and_ignored_dirs(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    _write(tmp_path / \"backend\" / \"app.py\", \"print('ok')\")\n    _write(tmp_path / \"frontend\" / \"index.ts\", \"const app = 1;\")\n    _write(tmp_path / \"docs\" / \"readme.md\", \"# hello\")\n    _write(tmp_path / \"data\" / \"seed.csv\", \"id,name\")\n    _write(tmp_path / \"node_modules\" / \"pkg\" / \"index.js\", \"ignored\")\n    _write(tmp_path / \".git\" / \"config\", \"ignored\")\n\n    result = RepoIngestor().ingest(tmp_path)\n\n    paths = [document.relative_path for document in result.documents]\n    assert \"backend/app.py\" in paths\n    assert \"frontend/index.ts\" in paths\n    assert \"docs/readme.md\" in paths\n    assert \"data/seed.csv\" not in paths\n    assert all(not path.startswith(\"node_modules/\") for path in paths)\n    assert all(not path.startswith(\".git/\") for path in paths)\n    assert result.errors == []\n\n\ndef test_ingest_collects_decode_errors(tmp_path: Path) -> None:\n    file_path = tmp_path / \"backend\" / \"broken.py\"\n    file_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    file_path.write_bytes(b\"\\xff\\xfe\\x00\\x00\")\n\n    result = RepoIngestor().ingest(tmp_path)\n\n    assert result.documents == []\n    assert len(result.errors) == 1\n    assert result.errors[0].relative_path == \"backend/broken.py\"\n",

    "content": "﻿📄 PRD：DevBrain（Local AI Codebase Intelligence System）\n1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）\n1.1 产品名称\n\nDevBrain（暂定）\n\n1.2 产品定位\n\nDevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：\n\n代码级问答\n项目结构理解\n自动文档生成\n1.3 产品愿景\n\n让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。\n\n1.4 核心价值\n📉 降低陌生项目理解成本\n⚡ 提升开发效率\n🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）\n🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力\n2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）\n2.1 核心用户\n独立开发者\n开源贡献者\n初中级工程师\n2.2 扩展用户\n小型开发团队\n技术负责人（快速理解项目）\n2.3 使用场景\n场景 1：快速理解项目\n\n“这个 repo 是做什么的？”\n\n场景 2：代码定位\n\n“登录逻辑在哪里？”\n\n场景 3：调用关系分析\n\n“userService 被哪些模块调用？”\n\n场景 4：自动生成文档\n\n“帮我生成 README”\n\n3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）\n\n当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：\n\n问题\t描述\n上手成本高\t新项目理解耗时\n文档缺失\tREADME 不完整或不存在\n代码复杂\t调用链难追踪\nAI 无上下文\t通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo\n4. 💡 解决方案（Solution）\n\nDevBrain 提供：\n\n4.1 代码解析引擎\n自动扫描代码\n提取结构（函数 / 类 / 模块）\n4.2 RAG 知识库\n将代码转为向量索引\n支持语义检索\n4.3 AI 问答系统\n基于代码上下文回答问题\n支持多文件推理\n4.4 文档生成系统\n自动生成 README\n自动总结模块功能\n4.5 本地运行能力\n支持 DeepSeek / 本地模型\n数据不出本地\n5. 🧱 产品功能（Features）\n5.1 MVP 功能（必须实现）\n5.1.1 仓库导入\n支持本地路径\n支持 GitHub URL\n5.1.2 文件扫描与过滤\n忽略：\nnode_modules\n.git\nbuild\n5.1.3 代码切分\n按文件 + 函数切分\n支持多语言\n5.1.4 向量索引\nembedding 生成\n存储到 FAISS\n5.1.5 语义检索\n支持 top-k 相似搜索\n5.1.6 AI 问答\n支持代码级问题\n返回答案 + 来源\n5.2 增强功能（P1）\n5.2.1 文档生成\nREADME\n模块说明\n5.2.2 简单 UI\nChat 界面\n文件树\n5.3 高级功能（P2）\n5.3.1 代码关系图\n函数调用关系\n模块依赖\n5.3.2 Agent 能力\n自动代码修改建议\n自动补全功能模块\n6. 🏗️ 系统架构（Architecture）\nFrontend (Next.js)\n        ↓\nFastAPI Backend\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| Code Parser (tree-sitter)\n-------------------------\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| RAG Engine\n| - Embedding\n| - FAISS\n-------------------------\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| LLM (DeepSeek)\n-------------------------\n7. 🔄 核心流程（Core Flow）\n7.1 索引流程\n导入 repo\n扫描文件\n切分代码\n生成 embedding\n存储向量\n7.2 问答流程\n用户输入问题\n检索相关代码 chunk\n拼接上下文\n调用 LLM\n返回答案 + 来源\n8. 📡 API 设计（简版）\n导入仓库\nPOST /repo/load\n构建索引\nPOST /repo/index\n提问\nPOST /ask\n{\n  \"question\": \"登录逻辑在哪里？\"\n}\n9. 🧠 关键技术方案\n9.1 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）\n向量检索 + LLM 推理\n9.2 代码解析\ntree-sitter 提取结构\n9.3 向量数据库\nFAISS（本地）\n9.4 模型\nDeepSeek API（兼容 OpenAI）\n10. 📊 成功指标（Success Metrics）\n技术指标\n查询响应时间 < 3s\n检索准确率（人工评估）≥ 80%\n产品指标\n能正确回答：\n项目结构问题\n代码定位问题\n开源指标\nGitHub Star\nFork 数\nIssue 活跃度\n11. ⚠️ 非目标（Out of Scope）\n\n当前阶段不做：\n\n多用户系统\n权限控制\n云端部署\n企业级协作\n12. 🗺️ Roadmap\nv0.1（MVP）\nRAG + Q&A\nRepo 导入\nv0.2\n文档生成\nUI\nv0.3\n代码关系图\nv0.4\nAgent 能力\n13. 🧾 技术选型\n模块\t技术\nBackend\tFastAPI\n向量库\tFAISS\nEmbedding\tsentence-transformers\nLLM\tDeepSeek\n解析\ttree-sitter",

    "content": "✅ 一、开发执行 Checklist（按完成顺序）\n\n你可以直接复制到 GitHub Projects / Notion 使用\n\n🧱 阶段 1：基础搭建（Day 1）\n✅ 基础设施\n 初始化项目结构（backend / core / frontend）\n 创建 requirements.txt\n 配置 .env（DeepSeek API）\n 启动 FastAPI 服务（health check API）\n📂 阶段 2：仓库导入（Day 1-2）\n 支持输入本地路径\n 实现文件递归扫描\n 实现文件过滤规则（.git / node_modules）\n 输出文件列表（JSON）\n 保存 project metadata\n🧠 阶段 3：代码切分（Day 2）\n 读取文件内容\n 实现基础 chunk（按长度）\n 给 chunk 加 metadata（file_path / line）\n 保存 chunk 到本地（json / db）\n\n👉 可选（加分）：\n\n 接入 tree-sitter（函数级切分）\n🔍 阶段 4：向量索引（Day 3）\n 接入 embedding（sentence-transformers）\n 为 chunk 生成 embedding\n 集成 FAISS\n 存储向量索引\n 实现简单 search(query)\n🤖 阶段 5：问答系统（Day 4）\n 实现 /ask API\n query → vector search\n 拼接上下文\n 调用 DeepSeek API\n 返回答案\n\n👉 必做增强：\n\n 返回 source 文件路径\n⚡ 阶段 6：优化体验（Day 5）\n 限制 token 长度\n 优化 top-k 检索策略\n 防止空结果\n 增加错误提示\n📝 阶段 7：文档生成（Day 6）\n 实现 README 生成 prompt\n 支持输入 repo → 输出 README\n 支持 markdown 输出\n🖥️ 阶段 8：简单前端（Day 6-7）\n 输入 repo 路径\n Chat UI（最简单即可）\n 显示回答 + 来源文件\n🚀 阶段 9：开源发布（Day 7）\n 写 README（核心卖点）\n 添加 Demo（gif / 视频）\n 添加架构图\n 上传 GitHub\n🗓️ 二、7天开发计划（真实可执行）\n🧨 Day 1：搭好骨架（不要拖）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 项目能跑\n\n任务\n初始化 FastAPI\n配置依赖\n写 /health API\n建好目录结构\n完成标准\nuvicorn app:app\n\n能访问\n\n🧨 Day 2：拿到代码 + 切分\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 能读取 repo 并切 chunk\n\n任务\n实现本地 repo 导入\n文件扫描\nchunk 切分（先简单）\n完成标准\n\n👉 输出：\n\n[\n  {\n    \"file\": \"app.py\",\n    \"chunk\": \"def login(): ...\"\n  }\n]\n🧨 Day 3：做向量检索\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 能“搜代码”\n\n任务\nembedding\nFAISS index\nsearch(query)\n完成标准\n\n输入：\n\nlogin function\n\n输出：\n👉 返回相关代码 chunk\n\n🧨 Day 4：打通 AI（关键日）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 真正变成 AI 项目\n\n任务\n接入 DeepSeek\n实现 /ask\nRAG流程\n完成标准\n\n输入：\n\n登录逻辑在哪？\n\n输出：\n👉 正确回答 + 文件路径\n\n🧨 Day 5：让结果“靠谱”\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 提升质量（不是乱答）\n\n任务\n优化检索（top-k）\n控制 token\nprompt优化\n完成标准\n\n👉 回答不胡编\n\n🧨 Day 6：做亮点（文档 + UI）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 可以展示\n\n任务\nREADME生成\n简单前端\n展示回答\n完成标准\n\n👉 可以演示给别人看\n\n🧨 Day 7：开源 + 包装\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 GitHub 项目上线\n\n任务\n写 README\n加 demo gif\n上传代码\nREADME必须包含：\n🔥 What is this\n🚀 Demo\n💡 Why it's different\n⚡ Quick start",

1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）
1.1 产品名称

DevBrain（暂定）

1.2 产品定位

DevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：

代码级问答
项目结构理解
自动文档生成
1.3 产品愿景

让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。

1.4 核心价值
📉 降低陌生项目理解成本
⚡ 提升开发效率
🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）
🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力

AI 无上下文	通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo

数据不出本地

1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）
1.1 产品名称

DevBrain（暂定）

1.2 产品定位

DevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：

代码级问答
项目结构理解
自动文档生成
1.3 产品愿景

让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。

1.4 核心价值
📉 降低陌生项目理解成本
⚡ 提升开发效率
🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）
🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力
2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）
2.1 核心用户
独立开发者
开源贡献者
初中级工程师
2.2 扩展用户
小型开发团队
技术负责人（快速理解项目）
2.3 使用场景
场景 1：快速理解项目

“这个 repo 是做什么的？”

场景 2：代码定位

“登录逻辑在哪里？”

场景 3：调用关系分析

“userService 被哪些模块调用？”

场景 4：自动生成文档

“帮我生成 README”

3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）

当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：

问题	描述
上手成本高	新项目理解耗时
文档缺失	README 不完整或不存在
代码复杂	调用链难追踪
AI 无上下文	通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo
4. 💡 解决方案（Solution）

DevBrain 提供：

4.1 代码解析引擎
自动扫描代码
提取结构（函数 / 类 / 模块）
4.2 RAG 知识库
将代码转为向量索引
支持语义检索
4.3 AI 问答系统
基于代码上下文回答问题
支持多文件推理
4.4 文档生成系统
自动生成 README
自动总结模块功能
4.5 本地运行能力
支持 DeepSeek / 本地模型
数据不出本地

    "relative_path": "AGENTS.md",
    "content": "# DevBrain Project Rules

## 🎯 Project Goal
Build a local-first AI system that understands codebases using RAG.

---

## 🧱 Architecture Rules

- Use modular architecture:
  - api/
  - core/
  - services/
  - models/

- Keep business logic inside `core/` and `services/`
- API layer should be thin (only request/response handling)

---

## ⚙️ Tech Stack Rules

- Backend: FastAPI
- Vector DB: FAISS
- Embedding: sentence-transformers
- LLM: DeepSeek (OpenAI-compatible API)
- Code parsing: tree-sitter

DO NOT introduce new frameworks unless necessary.

---

## 🧠 RAG Rules

- Always use retrieval before calling LLM
- Never answer without context from codebase
- Limit context size to avoid token overflow
- Prefer function-level chunks over raw text chunks

---

## 📂 Repo Handling Rules

- Ignore directories:
  - node_modules
  - .git
  - build
  - dist

- Only index relevant files:
  - .py .ts .js .md .json

---

## 🧾 Code Style

- Write clean, readable, modular code
- Use type hints (Python typing)
- Avoid large functions (>50 lines)
- Use clear naming (no abbreviations)

---

## 🚫 What NOT to do

- Do NOT over-engineer
- Do NOT add unnecessary abstractions
- Do NOT rewrite existing working logic
- Do NOT introduce complex frameworks

---

## 🔁 Workflow Rules

- Always:
  1. Understand existing code before editing
  2. Make minimal changes
  3. Keep consistency with current style

---

## 🧪 Testing Rules

- Ensure core logic is testable
- Avoid side effects in core modules

---

## 🧩 Future Extensions (Keep in mind)

- Code graph (NetworkX)
- Agent-based code modification
- Multi-repo support",

    "chunk_id": "backend/api/repo.py:1-164",
    "relative_path": "backend/api/repo.py",
    "content": "﻿import json
from pathlib import Path

from fastapi import APIRouter, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from backend.settings import settings
from core.chunking import chunk_documents
from core.indexing import build_and_save_index, search_index
from core.repo_import import (
    DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS,
    save_project_metadata,
    scan_repository_files,
)
from core.repo_ingestion import RepoIngestor

router = APIRouter(prefix="/repo", tags=["repo"])


class RepoLoadRequest(BaseModel):
    local_path: str = Field(..., description="Absolute or relative local repository path")


class RepoFileItem(BaseModel):
    path: str
    size: int


class RepoMetadataItem(BaseModel):
    project_id: str
    root_path: str
    imported_at: str
    file_count: int
    ignored_dirs: list[str]


class RepoLoadResponse(BaseModel):
    metadata: RepoMetadataItem
    files: list[RepoFileItem]


class RepoIndexRequest(BaseModel):
    project_id: str


class RepoIndexResponse(BaseModel):
    project_id: str
    root_path: str
    document_count: int
    chunk_count: int
    model_name: str


class RepoSearchRequest(BaseModel):
    project_id: str
    query: str
    top_k: int = Field(default=5, ge=1, le=20)


class SearchItem(BaseModel):
    chunk_id: str
    path: str
    score: float
    start_line: int
    end_line: int
    content: str


class RepoSearchResponse(BaseModel):
    project_id: str
    query: str
    results: list[SearchItem]


@router.post("/load", response_model=RepoLoadResponse)
def load_repo(payload: RepoLoadRequest) -> RepoLoadResponse:
    root = Path(payload.local_path).expanduser().resolve()
    if not root.exists():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Local path does not exist")
    if not root.is_dir():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Local path must be a directory")

    scanned_files = scan_repository_files(root, ignored_dirs=DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS)
    metadata = save_project_metadata(
        root,
        scanned_files,
        output_dir="data/projects",
        ignored_dirs=DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS,
    )

    return RepoLoadResponse(
        metadata=RepoMetadataItem(**metadata.__dict__),
        files=[RepoFileItem(path=item.path, size=item.size) for item in scanned_files],
    )


@router.post("/index", response_model=RepoIndexResponse)
def index_repo(payload: RepoIndexRequest) -> RepoIndexResponse:
    metadata = _read_project_metadata(payload.project_id)
    root_path = Path(metadata["root_path"])
    ingestion = RepoIngestor().ingest(root_path)
    chunks = chunk_documents(ingestion.documents)

    if not chunks:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="No chunks available to index")

    try:
        index_info = build_and_save_index(
            project_id=payload.project_id,
            chunks=chunks,
            model_name=settings.embedding_model,
            output_dir="data/index",
        )
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(exc)) from exc

    return RepoIndexResponse(
        project_id=payload.project_id,
        root_path=metadata["root_path"],
        document_count=len(ingestion.documents),
        chunk_count=index_info["chunk_count"],
        model_name=index_info["model_name"],
    )


@router.post("/search", response_model=RepoSearchResponse)
def semantic_search(payload: RepoSearchRequest) -> RepoSearchResponse:
    _read_project_metadata(payload.project_id)

    try:
        results = search_index(
            project_id=payload.project_id,
            query=payload.query,
            top_k=payload.top_k,
            model_name=settings.embedding_model,
            index_dir="data/index",
        )
    except FileNotFoundError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Index not found. Build index first.") from exc
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(exc)) from exc

    return RepoSearchResponse(
        project_id=payload.project_id,
        query=payload.query,
        results=[
            SearchItem(
                chunk_id=item.chunk_id,
                path=item.relative_path,
                score=item.score,
                start_line=item.start_line,
                end_line=item.end_line,
                content=item.content,
            )
            for item in results
        ],
    )


def _read_project_metadata(project_id: str) -> dict[str, str | int | list[str]]:
    metadata_path = Path("data/projects") / f"{project_id}.json"
    if not metadata_path.exists():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Project metadata not found")
    return json.loads(metadata_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:23-32",

    "content": "def chunk_documents(documents: Iterable[RepoDocument]) -> list[CodeChunk]:
    """Chunk repository documents by function blocks when possible."""

    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []
    for document in documents:

    "content": "def build_and_save_index(
    project_id: str,
    chunks: list[CodeChunk],
    model_name: str,
    output_dir: str | Path = "data/index",
) -> dict[str, str | int]:
    """Build embeddings and persist FAISS index + chunk metadata."""

    _ensure_dependencies()
    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer
    import faiss

    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)
    vectors = model.encode([chunk.content for chunk in chunks], normalize_embeddings=True)
    index = faiss.IndexFlatIP(vectors.shape[1])
    index.add(vectors)

    target = Path(output_dir).resolve()
    target.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    faiss.write_index(index, str(target / f"{project_id}.faiss"))
    (target / f"{project_id}.chunks.json").write_text(
        json.dumps([asdict(chunk) for chunk in chunks], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    (target / f"{project_id}.index.json").write_text(
        json.dumps(
            {"project_id": project_id, "model_name": model_name, "chunk_count": len(chunks)},
            ensure_ascii=False,
            indent=2,
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    return {"project_id": project_id, "chunk_count": len(chunks), "model_name": model_name}",

    """Search persisted FAISS index using semantic similarity."""

    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)

    "content": "def scan_repository_files(
    root_path: str | Path, ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None
) -> list[ScannedFile]:
    """Recursively scan files while skipping ignored directories."""

    root = Path(root_path).resolve()
    skip_dirs = ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS
    files: list[ScannedFile] = []

    for file_path in root.rglob("*"):
        if not file_path.is_file():
            continue
        relative = file_path.relative_to(root).as_posix()
        parent_parts = Path(relative).parts[:-1]
        if any(part in skip_dirs for part in parent_parts):
            continue

        files.append(ScannedFile(path=relative, size=file_path.stat().st_size))

    files.sort(key=lambda item: item.path)
    return files",

    "content": "﻿"""Repository ingestion utilities for codebase indexing."""

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Iterable

DEFAULT_IGNORED_DIRS = {".git", "node_modules", "build", "dist"}
DEFAULT_ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = {".py", ".ts", ".js", ".md", ".json"}


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RepoDocument:
    """A single ingested source document from the repository."""

    relative_path: str
    language: str
    content: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class IngestionError:
    """Captures file-level ingestion failures without stopping the pipeline."""

    relative_path: str
    message: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class IngestionResult:
    """The full output of repository ingestion."""

    root_path: str
    documents: list[RepoDocument]
    errors: list[IngestionError]


class RepoIngestor:
    """Ingest repository files while applying ignore and extension rules."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        ignored_dirs: Iterable[str] | None = None,
        allowed_extensions: Iterable[str] | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.ignored_dirs = set(ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_IGNORED_DIRS)
        self.allowed_extensions = {
            extension.lower() for extension in (allowed_extensions or DEFAULT_ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS)
        }

    def ingest(self, root_path: str | Path) -> IngestionResult:
        root = Path(root_path).resolve()
        documents: list[RepoDocument] = []
        errors: list[IngestionError] = []

        for file_path in self._iter_candidate_files(root):
            relative_path = file_path.relative_to(root).as_posix()
            try:
                content = file_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
            except (UnicodeDecodeError, OSError) as exc:
                errors.append(IngestionError(relative_path=relative_path, message=str(exc)))
                continue

            documents.append(
                RepoDocument(
                    relative_path=relative_path,
                    language=self._detect_language(file_path),
                    content=content,
                )
            )

        documents.sort(key=lambda document: document.relative_path)
        errors.sort(key=lambda error: error.relative_path)
        return IngestionResult(root_path=root.as_posix(), documents=documents, errors=errors)

    def _iter_candidate_files(self, root: Path) -> Iterable[Path]:
        for file_path in root.rglob("*"):
            if not file_path.is_file():
                continue
            if self._is_ignored(file_path, root):
                continue
            if file_path.suffix.lower() not in self.allowed_extensions:
                continue
            yield file_path

    def _is_ignored(self, file_path: Path, root: Path) -> bool:
        relative_parts = file_path.relative_to(root).parts
        return any(part in self.ignored_dirs for part in relative_parts[:-1])

    @staticmethod
    def _detect_language(file_path: Path) -> str:
        suffix = file_path.suffix.lower()
        if suffix == ".py":
            return "python"
        if suffix in {".ts", ".js"}:
            return "javascript"
        if suffix == ".md":
            return "markdown"
        if suffix == ".json":
            return "json"
        return "text"

    "content": "﻿from pathlib import Path

from core.repo_ingestion import RepoIngestor


def _write(path: Path, content: str) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_text(content, encoding="utf-8")


def test_ingest_filters_extensions_and_ignored_dirs(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    _write(tmp_path / "backend" / "app.py", "print('ok')")
    _write(tmp_path / "frontend" / "index.ts", "const app = 1;")
    _write(tmp_path / "docs" / "readme.md", "# hello")
    _write(tmp_path / "data" / "seed.csv", "id,name")
    _write(tmp_path / "node_modules" / "pkg" / "index.js", "ignored")
    _write(tmp_path / ".git" / "config", "ignored")

    result = RepoIngestor().ingest(tmp_path)

    paths = [document.relative_path for document in result.documents]
    assert "backend/app.py" in paths
    assert "frontend/index.ts" in paths
    assert "docs/readme.md" in paths
    assert "data/seed.csv" not in paths
    assert all(not path.startswith("node_modules/") for path in paths)
    assert all(not path.startswith(".git/") for path in paths)
    assert result.errors == []


def test_ingest_collects_decode_errors(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    file_path = tmp_path / "backend" / "broken.py"
    file_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    file_path.write_bytes(b"\xff\xfe\x00\x00")

    result = RepoIngestor().ingest(tmp_path)

    assert result.documents == []
    assert len(result.errors) == 1
    assert result.errors[0].relative_path == "backend/broken.py"

1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）
1.1 产品名称

DevBrain（暂定）

1.2 产品定位

DevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：

代码级问答
项目结构理解
自动文档生成
1.3 产品愿景

让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。

1.4 核心价值
📉 降低陌生项目理解成本
⚡ 提升开发效率
🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）
🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力
2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）
2.1 核心用户
独立开发者
开源贡献者

场景 2：代码定位

3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）

当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：

问题	描述

文档缺失	README 不完整或不存在

AI 无上下文	通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo

DevBrain 提供：

自动扫描代码

将代码转为向量索引

1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）
1.1 产品名称

DevBrain（暂定）

1.2 产品定位

DevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：

代码级问答
项目结构理解
自动文档生成
1.3 产品愿景

让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。

1.4 核心价值
📉 降低陌生项目理解成本
⚡ 提升开发效率
🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）
🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力
2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）
2.1 核心用户
独立开发者
开源贡献者
初中级工程师
2.2 扩展用户
小型开发团队
技术负责人（快速理解项目）
2.3 使用场景
场景 1：快速理解项目

“这个 repo 是做什么的？”

场景 2：代码定位

“登录逻辑在哪里？”

场景 3：调用关系分析

“userService 被哪些模块调用？”

场景 4：自动生成文档

“帮我生成 README”

3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）

当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：

问题	描述
上手成本高	新项目理解耗时
文档缺失	README 不完整或不存在
代码复杂	调用链难追踪
AI 无上下文	通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo
4. 💡 解决方案（Solution）

DevBrain 提供：

4.1 代码解析引擎
自动扫描代码
提取结构（函数 / 类 / 模块）
4.2 RAG 知识库
将代码转为向量索引
支持语义检索
4.3 AI 问答系统
基于代码上下文回答问题
支持多文件推理
4.4 文档生成系统

自动总结模块功能

    "content": "# DevBrain Project Rules

## 🎯 Project Goal
Build a local-first AI system that understands codebases using RAG.

---

## 🧱 Architecture Rules

- Use modular architecture:
  - api/
  - core/
  - services/
  - models/

- Keep business logic inside `core/` and `services/`
- API layer should be thin (only request/response handling)

---

## ⚙️ Tech Stack Rules

- Backend: FastAPI
- Vector DB: FAISS
- Embedding: sentence-transformers
- LLM: DeepSeek (OpenAI-compatible API)
- Code parsing: tree-sitter

DO NOT introduce new frameworks unless necessary.

---

## 🧠 RAG Rules

- Always use retrieval before calling LLM
- Never answer without context from codebase
- Limit context size to avoid token overflow
- Prefer function-level chunks over raw text chunks

---

## 📂 Repo Handling Rules

- Ignore directories:
  - node_modules
  - .git
  - build
  - dist

- Only index relevant files:
  - .py .ts .js .md .json

---

## 🧾 Code Style

- Write clean, readable, modular code
- Use type hints (Python typing)
- Avoid large functions (>50 lines)
- Use clear naming (no abbreviations)

---

## 🚫 What NOT to do

- Do NOT over-engineer
- Do NOT add unnecessary abstractions
- Do NOT rewrite existing working logic
- Do NOT introduce complex frameworks

---

## 🔁 Workflow Rules

- Always:
  1. Understand existing code before editing
  2. Make minimal changes
  3. Keep consistency with current style

---

## 🧪 Testing Rules

- Ensure core logic is testable
- Avoid side effects in core modules

---

## 🧩 Future Extensions (Keep in mind)

- Code graph (NetworkX)
- Agent-based code modification
- Multi-repo support",

    "content": "def ask_question(payload: AskRequest) -> AskResponse:
    question = payload.question.strip()
    if not question:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Question must not be empty")

    _read_project_metadata(payload.project_id)
    _ensure_index_files(payload.project_id)
    try:
        matches = search_index(
            project_id=payload.project_id,
            query=question,
            top_k=payload.top_k,
            model_name=settings.embedding_model,
            index_dir="data/index",
        )
    except FileNotFoundError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Index not found. Build index first.") from exc
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(exc)) from exc

    if not matches:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="No relevant context found for this question")

    if not settings.deepseek_api_key.strip():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail="DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is not configured")

    prompt = _build_prompt(question=question, matches=matches)
    try:
        answer = chat_completion(
            prompt=prompt,
            config=DeepSeekConfig(
                api_key=settings.deepseek_api_key,
                base_url=settings.deepseek_base_url,
                model=settings.deepseek_model,
            ),
        )
    except DeepSeekAPIError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=502, detail=str(exc)) from exc

    sources = [
        SourceItem(
            file_path=item.relative_path,
            line_range=f"{item.start_line}-{item.end_line}",
            start_line=item.start_line,
            end_line=item.end_line,
            score=item.score,
        )
        for item in matches
    ]
    return AskResponse(answer=answer, sources=sources)",

    "chunk_id": "backend/api/ask.py:86-110",
    "relative_path": "backend/api/ask.py",
    "content": "def _build_prompt(question: str, matches) -> str:
    context_parts: list[str] = []
    for idx, match in enumerate(matches, start=1):
        context_parts.append(
            "\n".join(
                [
                    f"[Context {idx}]",
                    f"file: {match.relative_path}",
                    f"line_range: {match.start_line}-{match.end_line}",
                    "code:",
                    match.content,
                ]
            )
        )

    context = "\n\n".join(context_parts)
    return "\n\n".join(
        [
            "Answer the user question only with the provided code context.",
            "If context is insufficient, say it clearly.",
            f"Question: {question}",
            "Context:",
            context,
        ]
    )",

    "content": "def load_repo(payload: RepoLoadRequest) -> RepoLoadResponse:
    root = Path(payload.local_path).expanduser().resolve()
    if not root.exists():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Local path does not exist")
    if not root.is_dir():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Local path must be a directory")

    scanned_files = scan_repository_files(root, ignored_dirs=DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS)
    metadata = save_project_metadata(
        root,
        scanned_files,
        output_dir="data/projects",
        ignored_dirs=DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS,
    )

    return RepoLoadResponse(
        metadata=RepoMetadataItem(**metadata.__dict__),
        files=[RepoFileItem(path=item.path, size=item.size) for item in scanned_files],
    )",

    "content": "def index_repo(payload: RepoIndexRequest) -> RepoIndexResponse:
    metadata = _read_project_metadata(payload.project_id)
    root_path = Path(metadata["root_path"])
    ingestion = RepoIngestor().ingest(root_path)
    chunks = chunk_documents(ingestion.documents)

    if not chunks:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="No chunks available to index")

    try:
        index_info = build_and_save_index(
            project_id=payload.project_id,
            chunks=chunks,
            model_name=settings.embedding_model,
            output_dir="data/index",
        )
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(exc)) from exc

    return RepoIndexResponse(
        project_id=payload.project_id,
        root_path=metadata["root_path"],
        document_count=len(ingestion.documents),
        chunk_count=index_info["chunk_count"],
        model_name=index_info["model_name"],
    )",

    "chunk_id": "backend/services/deepseek_client.py:24-70",
    "relative_path": "backend/services/deepseek_client.py",
    "content": "def chat_completion(prompt: str, config: DeepSeekConfig) -> str:
    """Send a non-streaming chat completion request and return answer text."""

    endpoint = f"{config.base_url.rstrip('/')}/chat/completions"
    payload = {
        "model": config.model,
        "messages": [
            {
                "role": "system",
                "content": (
                    "You are DevBrain, a codebase Q&A assistant. "
                    "Answer using only provided context and cite concrete files when possible."
                ),
            },
            {"role": "user", "content": prompt},
        ],
        "temperature": 0.1,
        "stream": False,
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {config.api_key}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}

    try:
        with httpx.Client(timeout=config.timeout_seconds) as client:
            response = client.post(endpoint, json=payload, headers=headers)
    except httpx.TimeoutException as exc:
        raise DeepSeekAPIError("DeepSeek request timed out") from exc
    except httpx.RequestError as exc:
        raise DeepSeekAPIError("DeepSeek request failed") from exc

    if response.status_code >= 400:
        message = response.text.strip()
        short_message = message[:300] if message else "empty response body"
        raise DeepSeekAPIError(f"DeepSeek returned HTTP {response.status_code}: {short_message}")

    try:
        body = response.json()
    except ValueError as exc:
        raise DeepSeekAPIError("DeepSeek response is not valid JSON") from exc

    try:
        answer = body["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
    except (KeyError, IndexError, TypeError) as exc:
        raise DeepSeekAPIError("DeepSeek response missing choices[0].message.content") from exc

    if not isinstance(answer, str) or not answer.strip():
        raise DeepSeekAPIError("DeepSeek returned an empty answer")
    return answer.strip()",

    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def chunk_documents(documents: Iterable[RepoDocument]) -> list[CodeChunk]:
    """Chunk repository documents by function blocks when possible."""

    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []
    for document in documents:
        produced = _chunk_python_document(document) if document.language == "python" else []
        if not produced:
            produced = [_chunk_whole_document(document)]
        chunks.extend(produced)
    return chunks",

  {
    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:35-61",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def _chunk_python_document(document: RepoDocument) -> list[CodeChunk]:
    try:
        tree = ast.parse(document.content)
    except SyntaxError:
        return []

    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []
    lines = document.content.splitlines()
    for node in ast.walk(tree):
        if not isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef, ast.ClassDef)):
            continue
        start_line = getattr(node, "lineno", 1)
        end_line = getattr(node, "end_lineno", start_line)
        content = "\n".join(lines[start_line - 1 : end_line]).strip()
        if not content:
            continue
        chunk_id = f"{document.relative_path}:{start_line}-{end_line}"
        chunks.append(
            CodeChunk(
                chunk_id=chunk_id,
                relative_path=document.relative_path,
                content=content,
                start_line=start_line,
                end_line=end_line,
            )
        )
    return sorted(chunks, key=lambda item: (item.relative_path, item.start_line))",

    "end_line": 61

    """Build embeddings and persist FAISS index + chunk metadata."""

    _ensure_dependencies()
    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)

    "content": "def _map_results(scores, indices, chunks: list[CodeChunk]) -> list[SearchResult]:
    results: list[SearchResult] = []
    for score, idx in zip(scores, indices):
        if idx < 0 or idx >= len(chunks):
            continue
        chunk = chunks[idx]
        results.append(
            SearchResult(
                chunk_id=chunk.chunk_id,
                relative_path=chunk.relative_path,

  {
    "chunk_id": "core/repo_import.py:33-53",
    "relative_path": "core/repo_import.py",
    "content": "def scan_repository_files(
    root_path: str | Path, ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None
) -> list[ScannedFile]:
    """Recursively scan files while skipping ignored directories."""

    root = Path(root_path).resolve()
    skip_dirs = ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS
    files: list[ScannedFile] = []

    for file_path in root.rglob("*"):
        if not file_path.is_file():
            continue
        relative = file_path.relative_to(root).as_posix()
        parent_parts = Path(relative).parts[:-1]
        if any(part in skip_dirs for part in parent_parts):
            continue

        files.append(ScannedFile(path=relative, size=file_path.stat().st_size))

    files.sort(key=lambda item: item.path)
    return files",
    "start_line": 33,
    "end_line": 53
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/repo_import.py:56-81",
    "relative_path": "core/repo_import.py",
    "content": "def save_project_metadata(
    root_path: str | Path,
    files: list[ScannedFile],
    output_dir: str | Path = "data/projects",
    ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None,
) -> ProjectMetadata:
    """Save metadata for an imported project and return the persisted model."""

    root = Path(root_path).resolve()
    skip_dirs = sorted(list(ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS))
    metadata = ProjectMetadata(
        project_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,
        root_path=root.as_posix(),
        imported_at=datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),
        file_count=len(files),
        ignored_dirs=skip_dirs,
    )

    target_dir = Path(output_dir).resolve()
    target_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    target_file = target_dir / f"{metadata.project_id}.json"
    target_file.write_text(
        json.dumps(asdict(metadata), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    return metadata",
    "start_line": 56,
    "end_line": 81
  },

    "content": "class CodeChunk:\n    \"\"\"A searchable unit produced from source documents.\"\"\"\n\n    chunk_id: str\n    relative_path: str\n    content: str\n    start_line: int\n    end_line: int",

    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def chunk_documents(documents: Iterable[RepoDocument]) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    \"\"\"Chunk repository documents by function blocks when possible.\"\"\"\n\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []\n    for document in documents:\n        produced = _chunk_python_document(document) if document.language == \"python\" else []\n        if not produced:\n            produced = [_chunk_whole_document(document)]\n        chunks.extend(produced)\n    return chunks",

  {
    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:35-61",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def _chunk_python_document(document: RepoDocument) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    try:\n        tree = ast.parse(document.content)\n    except SyntaxError:\n        return []\n\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []\n    lines = document.content.splitlines()\n    for node in ast.walk(tree):\n        if not isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef, ast.ClassDef)):\n            continue\n        start_line = getattr(node, \"lineno\", 1)\n        end_line = getattr(node, \"end_lineno\", start_line)\n        content = \"\\n\".join(lines[start_line - 1 : end_line]).strip()\n        if not content:\n            continue\n        chunk_id = f\"{document.relative_path}:{start_line}-{end_line}\"\n        chunks.append(\n            CodeChunk(\n                chunk_id=chunk_id,\n                relative_path=document.relative_path,\n                content=content,\n                start_line=start_line,\n                end_line=end_line,\n            )\n        )\n    return sorted(chunks, key=lambda item: (item.relative_path, item.start_line))",
    "start_line": 35,
    "end_line": 61
  },

    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:64-73",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def _chunk_whole_document(document: RepoDocument) -> CodeChunk:\n    lines = document.content.splitlines()\n    end_line = max(len(lines), 1)\n    return CodeChunk(\n        chunk_id=f\"{document.relative_path}:1-{end_line}\",\n        relative_path=document.relative_path,\n        content=document.content,\n        start_line=1,\n        end_line=end_line,\n    )",

    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def build_and_save_index(\n    project_id: str,\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk],\n    model_name: str,\n    output_dir: str | Path = \"data/index\",\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    \"\"\"Build embeddings and persist FAISS index + chunk metadata.\"\"\"\n\n    _ensure_dependencies()\n    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer\n    import faiss\n\n    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)\n    vectors = model.encode([chunk.content for chunk in chunks], normalize_embeddings=True)\n    index = faiss.IndexFlatIP(vectors.shape[1])\n    index.add(vectors)\n\n    target = Path(output_dir).resolve()\n    target.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    faiss.write_index(index, str(target / f\"{project_id}.faiss\"))\n    (target / f\"{project_id}.chunks.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps([asdict(chunk) for chunk in chunks], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    (target / f\"{project_id}.index.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(\n            {\"project_id\": project_id, \"model_name\": model_name, \"chunk_count\": len(chunks)},\n            ensure_ascii=False,\n            indent=2,\n        ),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return {\"project_id\": project_id, \"chunk_count\": len(chunks), \"model_name\": model_name}",
    "start_line": 24,
    "end_line": 56
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:59-78",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def search_index(\n    project_id: str,\n    query: str,\n    top_k: int,\n    model_name: str,\n    index_dir: str | Path = \"data/index\",\n) -> list[SearchResult]:\n    \"\"\"Search persisted FAISS index using semantic similarity.\"\"\"\n\n    _ensure_dependencies()\n    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer\n    import faiss\n\n    source = Path(index_dir).resolve()\n    index = faiss.read_index(str(source / f\"{project_id}.faiss\"))\n    chunks = _load_chunks(source / f\"{project_id}.chunks.json\")\n    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)\n    query_vector = model.encode([query], normalize_embeddings=True)\n    scores, indices = index.search(query_vector, top_k)\n    return _map_results(scores[0], indices[0], chunks)",
    "start_line": 59,
    "end_line": 78
  },

    "content": "def _load_chunks(path: Path) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    raw_items = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    return [CodeChunk(**item) for item in raw_items]",

  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:86-102",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def _map_results(scores, indices, chunks: list[CodeChunk]) -> list[SearchResult]:\n    results: list[SearchResult] = []\n    for score, idx in zip(scores, indices):\n        if idx < 0 or idx >= len(chunks):\n            continue\n        chunk = chunks[idx]\n        results.append(\n            SearchResult(\n                chunk_id=chunk.chunk_id,\n                relative_path=chunk.relative_path,\n                score=float(score),\n                start_line=chunk.start_line,\n                end_line=chunk.end_line,\n                content=chunk.content,\n            )\n        )\n    return results",

    "chunk_id": "core/repo_import.py:33-53",
    "relative_path": "core/repo_import.py",
    "content": "def scan_repository_files(\n    root_path: str | Path, ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None\n) -> list[ScannedFile]:\n    \"\"\"Recursively scan files while skipping ignored directories.\"\"\"\n\n    root = Path(root_path).resolve()\n    skip_dirs = ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS\n    files: list[ScannedFile] = []\n\n    for file_path in root.rglob(\"*\"):\n        if not file_path.is_file():\n            continue\n        relative = file_path.relative_to(root).as_posix()\n        parent_parts = Path(relative).parts[:-1]\n        if any(part in skip_dirs for part in parent_parts):\n            continue\n\n        files.append(ScannedFile(path=relative, size=file_path.stat().st_size))\n\n    files.sort(key=lambda item: item.path)\n    return files",
    "start_line": 33,
    "end_line": 53
  },

    "content": "def save_project_metadata(\n    root_path: str | Path,\n    files: list[ScannedFile],\n    output_dir: str | Path = \"data/projects\",\n    ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None,\n) -> ProjectMetadata:\n    \"\"\"Save metadata for an imported project and return the persisted model.\"\"\"\n\n    root = Path(root_path).resolve()\n    skip_dirs = sorted(list(ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS))\n    metadata = ProjectMetadata(\n        project_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n        root_path=root.as_posix(),\n        imported_at=datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n        file_count=len(files),\n        ignored_dirs=skip_dirs,\n    )\n\n    target_dir = Path(output_dir).resolve()\n    target_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    target_file = target_dir / f\"{metadata.project_id}.json\"\n    target_file.write_text(\n        json.dumps(asdict(metadata), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return metadata",

\"relative_path\": \"docs/PRD.md\",\n    \"content\": \"📄 PRD：DevBrain（Local AI Codebase Intelligence System）\\n1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）\\n1.1 产品名称\\n\\nDevBrain（暂定）\\n\\n1.2 产品定位\\n\\nDevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：\\n\\n代码级问答\\n项目结构理解\\n自动文档生成\\n1.3 产品愿景\\n\\n让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。\\n\\n1.4 核心价值\\n📉 降低陌生项目理解成本\\n⚡ 提升开发效率\\n🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）\\n🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力\\n2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）\\n2.1 核心用户\\n独立开发者\\n开源贡献者\\n初中级工程师\\n2.2 扩展用户\\n小型开发团队\\n技术负责人（快速理解项目）\\n2.3 使用场景\\n场景 1：快速理解项目\\n\\n“这个 repo 是做什么的？”\\n\\n场景 2：代码定位\\n\\n“登录逻辑在哪里？”\\n\\n场景 3：调用关系分析\\n\\n“userService 被哪些模块调用？”\\n\\n场景 4：自动生成文档\\n\\n“帮我生成 README”\\n\\n3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）\\n\\n当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：\\n\\n问题\\t描述\\n上手成本高\\t新项目理解耗时\\n文档缺失\\tREADME 不完整或不存在\\n代码复杂\\t调用链难追踪\\nAI 无上下文\\t通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo\\n4. 💡 解决方案（Solution）\\n\\nDevBrain 提供：\\n\\n4.1 代码解析引擎\\n自动扫描代码\\n提取结构（函数 / 类 / 模块）\\n4.2 RAG 知识库\\n将代码转为向量索引\\n支持语义检索\\n4.3 AI 问答系统\\n基于代码上下文回答问题\\n支持多文件推理\\n4.4 文档生成系统\\n自动生成 README\\n自动总结模块功能\\n4.5 本地运行能力\\n支持 DeepSeek / 本地模型\\n数据不出本地\\n5. 🧱 产品功能（Features）\\n5.1 MVP 功能（必须实现）\\n5.1.1 仓库导入\\n支持本地路径\\n支持 GitHub URL\\n5.1.2 文件扫描与过滤\\n忽略：\\nnode_modules\\n.git\\nbuild\\n5.1.3 代码切分\\n按文件 + 函数切分\\n支持多语言\\n5.1.4 向量索引\\nembedding 生成\\n存储到 FAISS\\n5.1.5 语义检索\\n支持 top-k 相似搜索\\n5.1.6 AI 问答\\n支持代码级问题\\n返回答案 + 来源\\n5.2 增强功能（P1）\\n5.2.1 文档生成\\nREADME\\n模块说明\\n5.2.2 简单 UI\\nChat 界面\\n文件树\\n5.3 高级功能（P2）\\n5.3.1 代码关系图\\n函数调用关系\\n模块依赖\\n5.3.2 Agent 能力\\n自动代码修改建议\\n自动补全功能模块\\n6. 🏗️ 系统架构（Architecture）\\nFrontend (Next.js)\\n        ↓\\nFastAPI Backend\\n        ↓\\n-------------------------\\n| Code Parser     "content": "📄 PRD：DevBrain（Local AI Codebase Intelligence System）\n1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）\n1.1 产品名称\n\nDevBrain（暂定）\n\n1.2 产品定位\n\nDevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：\n\n代码级问答\n项目结构理解\n自动文档生成\n1.3 产品愿景\n\n让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。\n\n1.4 核心价值\n📉 降低陌生项目理解成本\n⚡ 提升开发效率\n🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）\n🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力\n2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）\n2.1 核心用户\n独立开发者\n开源贡献者\n初中级工程师\n2.2 扩展用户\n小型开发团队\n技术负责人（快速理解项目）\n2.3 使用场景\n场景 1：快速理解项目\n\n“这个 repo 是做什么的？”\n\n场景 2：代码定位\n\n“登录逻辑在哪里？”\n\n场景 3：调用关系分析\n\n“userService 被哪些模块调用？”\n\n场景 4：自动生成文档\n\n“帮我生成 README”\n\n3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）\n\n当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：\n\n问题\t描述\n上手成本高\t新项目理解耗时\n文档缺失\tREADME 不完整或不存在\n代码复杂\t调用链难追踪\nAI 无上下文\t通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo\n4. 💡 解决方案（Solution）\n\nDevBrain 提供：\n\n4.1 代码解析引擎\n自动扫描代码\n提取结构（函数 / 类 / 模块）\n4.2 RAG 知识库\n将代码转为向量索引\n支持语义检索\n4.3 AI 问答系统\n基于代码上下文回答问题\n支持多文件推理\n4.4 文档生成系统\n自动生成 README\n自动总结模块功能\n4.5 本地运行能力\n支持 DeepSeek / 本地模型\n数据不出本地\n5. 🧱 产品功能（Features）\n5.1 MVP 功能（必须实现）\n5.1.1 仓库导入\n支持本地路径\n支持 GitHub URL\n5.1.2 文件扫描与过滤\n忽略：\nnode_modules\n.git\nbuild\n5.1.3 代码切分\n按文件 + 函数切分\n支持多语言\n5.1.4 向量索引\nembedding 生成\n存储到 FAISS\n5.1.5 语义检索\n支持 top-k 相似搜索\n5.1.6 AI 问答\n支持代码级问题\n返回答案 + 来源\n5.2 增强功能（P1）\n5.2.1 文档生成\nREADME\n模块说明\n5.2.2 简单 UI\nChat 界面\n文件树\n5.3 高级功能（P2）\n5.3.1 代码关系图\n函数调用关系\n模块依赖\n5.3.2 Agent 能力\n自动代码修改建议\n自动补全功能模块\n6. 🏗️ 系统架构（Architecture）\nFrontend (Next.js)\n        ↓\nFastAPI Backend\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| Code Parser (tree-sitter)\n-------------------------\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| RAG Engine\n| - Embedding\n| - FAISS\n-------------------------\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| LLM (DeepSeek)\n-------------------------\n7. 🔄 核心流程（Core Flow）\n7.1 索引流程\n导入 repo\n扫描文件\n切分代码\n生成 embedding\n存储向量\n7.2 问答流程\n用户输入问题\n检索相关代码 chunk\n拼接上下文\n调用 LLM\n返回答案 + 来源\n8. 📡 API 设计（简版）\n导入仓库\nPOST /repo/load\n构建索引\nPOST /repo/index\n提问\nPOST /ask\n{\n  \"question\": \"登录逻辑在哪里？\"\n}\n9. 🧠 关键技术方案\n9.1 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）\n向量检索 + LLM 推理\n9.2 代码解析\ntree-sitter 提取结构\n9.3 向量数据库\nFAISS（本地）\n9.4 模型\nDeepSeek API（兼容 OpenAI）\n10. 📊 成功指标（Success Metrics）\n技术指标\n查询响应时间 < 3s\n检索准确率（人工评估）≥ 80%\n产品指标\n能正确回答：\n项目结构问题\n代码定位问题\n开源指标\nGitHub Star\nFork 数\nIssue 活跃度\n11. ⚠️ 非目标（Out of Scope）\n\n当前阶段不做：\n\n多用户系统\n权限控制\n云端部署\n企业级协作\n12. 🗺️ Roadmap\nv0.1（MVP）\nRAG + Q&A\nRepo 导入\nv0.2\n文档生成\nUI\nv0.3\n代码关系图\nv0.4\nAgent 能力\n13. 🧾 技术选型\n模块\t技术\nBackend\tFastAPI\n向量库\tFAISS\nEmbedding\tsentence-transformers\nLLM\tDeepSeek\n解析\ttree-sitter",

    "content": "✅ 一、开发执行 Checklist（按完成顺序）\n\n你可以直接复制到 GitHub Projects / Notion 使用\n\n🧱 阶段 1：基础搭建（Day 1）\n✅ 基础设施\n 初始化项目结构（backend / core / frontend）\n 创建 requirements.txt\n 配置 .env（DeepSeek API）\n 启动 FastAPI 服务（health check API）\n📂 阶段 2：仓库导入（Day 1-2）\n 支持输入本地路径\n 实现文件递归扫描\n 实现文件过滤规则（.git / node_modules）\n 输出文件列表（JSON）\n 保存 project metadata\n🧠 阶段 3：代码切分（Day 2）\n 读取文件内容\n 实现基础 chunk（按长度）\n 给 chunk 加 metadata（file_path / line）\n 保存 chunk 到本地（json / db）\n\n👉 可选（加分）：\n\n 接入 tree-sitter（函数级切分）\n🔍 阶段 4：向量索引（Day 3）\n 接入 embedding（sentence-transformers）\n 为 chunk 生成 embedding\n 集成 FAISS\n 存储向量索引\n 实现简单 search(query)\n🤖 阶段 5：问答系统（Day 4）\n 实现 /ask API\n query → vector search\n 拼接上下文\n 调用 DeepSeek API\n 返回答案\n\n👉 必做增强：\n\n 返回 source 文件路径\n⚡ 阶段 6：优化体验（Day 5）\n 限制 token 长度\n 优化 top-k 检索策略\n 防止空结果\n 增加错误提示\n📝 阶段 7：文档生成（Day 6）\n 实现 README 生成 prompt\n 支持输入 repo → 输出 README\n 支持 markdown 输出\n🖥️ 阶段 8：简单前端（Day 6-7）\n 输入 repo 路径\n Chat UI（最简单即可）\n 显示回答 + 来源文件\n🚀 阶段 9：开源发布（Day 7）\n 写 README（核心卖点）\n 添加 Demo（gif / 视频）\n 添加架构图\n 上传 GitHub\n🗓️ 二、7天开发计划（真实可执行）\n🧨 Day 1：搭好骨架（不要拖）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 项目能跑\n\n任务\n初始化 FastAPI\n配置依赖\n写 /health API\n建好目录结构\n完成标准\nuvicorn app:app\n\n能访问\n\n🧨 Day 2：拿到代码 + 切分\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 能读取 repo 并切 chunk\n\n任务\n实现本地 repo 导入\n文件扫描\nchunk 切分（先简单）\n完成标准\n\n👉 输出：\n\n[\n  {\n    \"file\": \"app.py\",\n    \"chunk\": \"def login(): ...\"\n  }\n]\n🧨 Day 3：做向量检索\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 能“搜代码”\n\n任务\nembedding\nFAISS index\nsearch(query)\n完成标准\n\n输入：\n\nlogin function\n\n输出：\n👉 返回相关代码 chunk\n\n🧨 Day 4：打通 AI（关键日）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 真正变成 AI 项目\n\n任务\n接入 DeepSeek\n实现 /ask\nRAG流程\n完成标准\n\n输入：\n\n登录逻辑在哪？\n\n输出：\n👉 正确回答 + 文件路径\n\n🧨 Day 5：让结果“靠谱”\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 提升质量（不是乱答）\n\n任务\n优化检索（top-k）\n控制 token\nprompt优化\n完成标准\n\n👉 回答不胡编\n\n🧨 Day 6：做亮点（文档 + UI）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 可以展示\n\n任务\nREADME生成\n简单前端\n展示回答\n完成标准\n\n👉 可以演示给别人看\n\n🧨 Day 7：开源 + 包装\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 GitHub 项目上线\n\n任务\n写 README\n加 demo gif\n上传代码\nREADME必须包含：\n🔥 What is this\n🚀 Demo\n💡 Why it's different\n⚡ Quick start",

    "content": "# DevBrain Project Rules\n\n## 🎯 Project Goal\nBuild a local-first AI system that understands codebases using RAG.\n\n---\n\n## 🧱 Architecture Rules\n\n- Use modular architecture:\n  - api/\n  - core/\n  - services/\n  - models/\n\n- Keep business logic inside `core/` and `services/`\n- API layer should be thin (only request/response handling)\n\n---\n\n## ⚙️ Tech Stack Rules\n\n- Backend: FastAPI\n- Vector DB: FAISS\n- Embedding: sentence-transformers\n- LLM: DeepSeek (OpenAI-compatible API)\n- Code parsing: tree-sitter\n\nDO NOT introduce new frameworks unless necessary.\n\n---\n\n## 🧠 RAG Rules\n\n- Always use retrieval before calling LLM\n- Never answer without context from codebase\n- Limit context size to avoid token overflow\n- Prefer function-level chunks over raw text chunks\n\n---\n\n## 📂 Repo Handling Rules\n\n- Ignore directories:\n  - node_modules\n  - .git\n  - build\n  - dist\n\n- Only index relevant files:\n  - .py .ts .js .md .json\n\n---\n\n## 🧾 Code Style\n\n- Write clean, readable, modular code\n- Use type hints (Python typing)\n- Avoid large functions (>50 lines)\n- Use clear naming (no abbreviations)\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 What NOT to do\n\n- Do NOT over-engineer\n- Do NOT add unnecessary abstractions\n- Do NOT rewrite existing working logic\n- Do NOT introduce complex frameworks\n\n---\n\n## 🔁 Workflow Rules\n\n- Always:\n  1. Understand existing code before editing\n  2. Make minimal changes\n  3.     "content": "def load_repo(payload: RepoLoadRequest) -> RepoLoadResponse:\n    root = Path(payload.local_path).expanduser().resolve()\n    if not root.exists():\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"Local path does not exist\")\n    if not root.is_dir():\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"Local path must be a directory\")\n\n    scanned_files = scan_repository_files(root, ignored_dirs=DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS)\n    metadata = save_project_metadata(\n        root,\n        scanned_files,\n        output_dir=\"data/projects\",\n        ignored_dirs=DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS,\n    )\n\n    return RepoLoadResponse(\n        metadata=RepoMetadataItem(**metadata.__dict__),\n        files=[RepoFileItem(path=item.path, size=item.size) for item in scanned_files],\n    )",

    "content": "def index_repo(payload: RepoIndexRequest) -> RepoIndexResponse:\n    metadata = _read_project_metadata(payload.project_id)\n    root_path = Path(metadata[\"root_path\"])\n    ingestion = RepoIngestor().ingest(root_path)\n    chunks = chunk_documents(ingestion.documents)\n\n    if not chunks:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"No chunks available to index\")\n\n    try:\n        index_info = build_and_save_index(\n            project_id=payload.project_id,\n            chunks=chunks,\n            model_name=settings.embedding_model,\n            output_dir=\"data/index\",\n        )\n    except RuntimeError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n\n    return RepoIndexResponse(\n        project_id=payload.project_id,\n        root_path=metadata[\"root_path\"],\n        document_count=len(ingestion.documents),\n        chunk_count=index_info[\"chunk_count\"],\n        model_name=index_info[\"model_name\"],\n    )",

Build index first.\") from exc\n    except RuntimeError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(exc)) from exc\n\n    return RepoSearchResponse(\n        project_id=payload.project_id,\n        query=payload.query,\n        results=[\n            SearchItem(\n                chunk_id=item.chunk_id,\n                path=item.relative_path,\n                score=item.score,\n                start_line=item.start_line,\n                end_line=item.end_line,\n                content=item.content,\n            )\n            for item in results\n        ],\n    )",

    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:13-20",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "class CodeChunk:\n    \"\"\"A searchable unit produced from source documents.\"\"\"\n\n    chunk_id: str\n    relative_path: str\n    content: str\n    start_line: int\n    end_line: int",
    "start_line": 13,
    "end_line": 20
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:23-32",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def chunk_documents(documents: Iterable[RepoDocument]) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    \"\"\"Chunk repository documents by function blocks when possible.\"\"\"\n\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []\n    for document in documents:\n        produced = _chunk_python_document(document) if document.language == \"python\" else []\n        if not produced:\n            produced = [_chunk_whole_document(document)]\n        chunks.extend(produced)\n    return chunks",
    "start_line": 23,
    "end_line": 32
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:35-61",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def _chunk_python_document(document: RepoDocument) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    try:\n        tree = ast.parse(document.content)\n    except SyntaxError:\n        return []\n\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []\n    lines = document.content.splitlines()\n    for node in ast.walk(tree):\n        if not isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef, ast.ClassDef)):\n            continue\n        start_line = getattr(node, \"lineno\", 1)\n        end_line = getattr(node, \"end_lineno\", start_line)\n        content = \"\\n\".join(lines[start_line - 1 : end_line]).strip()\n        if not content:\n            continue\n        chunk_id = f\"{document.relative_path}:{start_line}-{end_line}\"\n        chunks.append(\n            CodeChunk(\n                chunk_id=chunk_id,\n                relative_path=document.relative_path,\n                content=content,\n                start_line=start_line,\n                end_line=end_line,\n            )\n        )\n    return sorted(chunks, key=lambda item: (item.relative_path, item.start_line))",
    "start_line": 35,
    "end_line": 61
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:64-73",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def _chunk_whole_document(document: RepoDocument) -> CodeChunk:\n    lines = document.content.splitlines()\n    end_line = max(len(lines), 1)\n    return CodeChunk(\n        chunk_id=f\"{document.relative_path}:1-{end_line}\",\n        relative_path=document.relative_path,\n        content=document.content,\n        start_line=1,\n        end_line=end_line,\n    )",
    "start_line": 64,
    "end_line": 73
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:13-21",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "class SearchResult:\n    \"\"\"A semantic search match from indexed chunks.\"\"\"\n\n    chunk_id: str\n    relative_path: str\n    score: float\n    start_line: int\n    end_line: int\n    content: str",
    "start_line": 13,
    "end_line": 21
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:24-56",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def build_and_save_index(\n    project_id: str,\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk],\n    model_name: str,\n    output_dir: str | Path = \"data/index\",\n) -> dict[str, str | int]:\n    \"\"\"Build embeddings and persist FAISS index + chunk metadata.\"\"\"\n\n    _ensure_dependencies()\n    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer\n    import faiss\n\n    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)\n    vectors = model.encode([chunk.content for chunk in chunks], normalize_embeddings=True)\n    index = faiss.IndexFlatIP(vectors.shape[1])\n    index.add(vectors)\n\n    target = Path(output_dir).resolve()\n    target.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    faiss.write_index(index, str(target / f\"{project_id}.faiss\"))\n    (target / f\"{project_id}.chunks.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps([asdict(chunk) for chunk in chunks], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    (target / f\"{project_id}.index.json\").write_text(\n        json.dumps(\n            {\"project_id\": project_id, \"model_name\": model_name, \"chunk_count\": len(chunks)},\n            ensure_ascii=False,\n            indent=2,\n        ),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return {\"project_id\": project_id, \"chunk_count\": len(chunks), \"model_name\": model_name}",
    "start_line": 24,
    "end_line": 56
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:59-78",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def search_index(\n    project_id: str,\n    query: str,\n    top_k: int,\n    model_name: str,\n    index_dir: str | Path = \"data/index\",\n) -> list[SearchResult]:\n    \"\"\"Search persisted FAISS index using semantic similarity.\"\"\"\n\n    _ensure_dependencies()\n    from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer\n    import faiss\n\n    source = Path(index_dir).resolve()\n    index = faiss.read_index(str(source / f\"{project_id}.faiss\"))\n    chunks = _load_chunks(source / f\"{project_id}.chunks.json\")\n    model = SentenceTransformer(model_name)\n    query_vector = model.encode([query], normalize_embeddings=True)\n    scores, indices = index.search(query_vector, top_k)\n    return _map_results(scores[0], indices[0], chunks)",
    "start_line": 59,
    "end_line": 78
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:81-83",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def _load_chunks(path: Path) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    raw_items = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n    return [CodeChunk(**item) for item in raw_items]",
    "start_line": 81,
    "end_line": 83
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/indexing.py:86-102",
    "relative_path": "core/indexing.py",
    "content": "def _map_results(scores, indices, chunks: list[CodeChunk]) -> list[SearchResult]:\n    results: list[SearchResult] = []\n    for score, idx in zip(scores, indices):\n        if idx < 0 or idx >= len(chunks):\n            continue\n        chunk = chunks[idx]\n        results.append(\n            SearchResult(\n                chunk_id=chunk.chunk_id,\n                relative_path=chunk.relative_path,\n                score=float(score),\n                start_line=chunk.start_line,\n                end_line=chunk.end_line,\n                content=chunk.content,\n            )\n        )\n    return results",
    "start_line": 86,

  {
    "chunk_id": "core/repo_import.py:33-53",
    "relative_path": "core/repo_import.py",
    "content": "def scan_repository_files(\n    root_path: str | Path, ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None\n) -> list[ScannedFile]:\n    \"\"\"Recursively scan files while skipping ignored directories.\"\"\"\n\n    root = Path(root_path).resolve()\n    skip_dirs = ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS\n    files: list[ScannedFile] = []\n\n    for file_path in root.rglob(\"*\"):\n        if not file_path.is_file():\n            continue\n        relative = file_path.relative_to(root).as_posix()\n        parent_parts = Path(relative).parts[:-1]\n        if any(part in skip_dirs for part in parent_parts):\n            continue\n\n        files.append(ScannedFile(path=relative, size=file_path.stat().st_size))\n\n    files.sort(key=lambda item: item.path)\n    return files",
    "start_line": 33,
    "end_line": 53
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/repo_import.py:56-81",
    "relative_path": "core/repo_import.py",
    "content": "def save_project_metadata(\n    root_path: str | Path,\n    files: list[ScannedFile],\n    output_dir: str | Path = \"data/projects\",\n    ignored_dirs: set[str] | None = None,\n) -> ProjectMetadata:\n    \"\"\"Save metadata for an imported project and return the persisted model.\"\"\"\n\n    root = Path(root_path).resolve()\n    skip_dirs = sorted(list(ignored_dirs or DEFAULT_SCAN_IGNORED_DIRS))\n    metadata = ProjectMetadata(\n        project_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n        root_path=root.as_posix(),\n        imported_at=datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n        file_count=len(files),\n        ignored_dirs=skip_dirs,\n    )\n\n    target_dir = Path(output_dir).resolve()\n    target_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    target_file = target_dir / f\"{metadata.project_id}.json\"\n    target_file.write_text(\n        json.dumps(asdict(metadata), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return metadata",
    "start_line": 56,

是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：\\n\\n代码级问答\\n项目结构理解\\n自动文档生成\\n1.3 产品愿景\\n\\n让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。\\n\\n1.4 核心价值\\n📉 降低陌生项目理解成本\\n⚡ 提升开发效率\\n🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）\\n🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力\\n2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）\\n2.1 核心用户\\n独立开发者\\n开源贡献者\\n初中级工程师\\n2.2 扩展用户\\n小型开发团队\\n技术负责人（快速理解项目）\\n2.3 使用场景\\n场景 1：快速理解项目\\n\\n“这个 repo 是做什么的？”\\n\\n场景 2：代码定位\\n\\n“登录逻辑在哪里？”\\n\\n场景 3：调用关系分析\\n\\n“userService 被哪些模块调用？”\\n\\n场景 4：自动生成文档\\n\\n“帮我生成 README”\\n\\n3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）\\n\\n当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：\\n\\n问题\\t描述\\n上手成本高\\t新项目理解耗时\\n文档缺失\\tREADME 不完整或不存在\\n代码复杂\\t调用链难追踪\\nAI 无上下文\\t通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo\\n4. 💡 解决方案（Solution）\\n\\nDevBrain 提供：\\n\\n4.1 代码解析引擎\\n自动扫描代码\\n提取结构（函数 / 类 / 模块）\\n4.2 RAG 知识库\\n将代码转为向量索引\\n支持语义检索\\n4.3 AI 问答系统\\n基于代码上下文回答问题\\n支持多文件推理\\n4.4 文档生成系统\\n自动生成 README\\n自动总结模块功能\\n4.5 本地运行能力\\n支持 DeepSeek / 本地模型\\n数据不出本地\\n5. 🧱 产品功能（Features）\\n5.1 MVP 功能（必须实现）\\n5.1.1 仓库导入\\n支持本地路径\\n支持 GitHub URL\\n5.1.2 文件扫描与过滤\\n忽略：\\nnode_modules\\n.git\\nbuild\\n5.1.3 代码切分\\n按文件 + 函数切分\\n支持多语言\\n5.1.4 向量索引\\nembedding 生成\\n存储到     "chunk_id": "docs/PRD.md:1-198",
    "relative_path": "docs/PRD.md",
    "content": "📄 PRD：DevBrain（Local AI Codebase Intelligence System）\n1. 📌 产品概述（Product Overview）\n1.1 产品名称\n\nDevBrain（暂定）\n\n1.2 产品定位\n\nDevBrain 是一个本地运行的 AI 代码理解系统，能够解析整个代码仓库，通过 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）实现：\n\n代码级问答\n项目结构理解\n自动文档生成\n1.3 产品愿景\n\n让 AI 真正“理解代码”，成为开发者的本地智能助手，而不是仅仅聊天工具。\n\n1.4 核心价值\n📉 降低陌生项目理解成本\n⚡ 提升开发效率\n🔒 数据完全本地运行（隐私安全）\n🧠 提供比通用 LLM 更精准的代码理解能力\n2. 🎯 目标用户（Target Users）\n2.1 核心用户\n独立开发者\n开源贡献者\n初中级工程师\n2.2 扩展用户\n小型开发团队\n技术负责人（快速理解项目）\n2.3 使用场景\n场景 1：快速理解项目\n\n“这个 repo 是做什么的？”\n\n场景 2：代码定位\n\n“登录逻辑在哪里？”\n\n场景 3：调用关系分析\n\n“userService 被哪些模块调用？”\n\n场景 4：自动生成文档\n\n“帮我生成 README”\n\n3. ❗问题定义（Problem Statement）\n\n当前开发者在面对代码仓库时存在以下问题：\n\n问题\t描述\n上手成本高\t新项目理解耗时\n文档缺失\tREADME 不完整或不存在\n代码复杂\t调用链难追踪\nAI 无上下文\t通用 AI 无法理解整个 repo\n4. 💡 解决方案（Solution）\n\nDevBrain 提供：\n\n4.1 代码解析引擎\n自动扫描代码\n提取结构（函数 / 类 / 模块）\n4.2 RAG 知识库\n将代码转为向量索引\n支持语义检索\n4.3 AI 问答系统\n基于代码上下文回答问题\n支持多文件推理\n4.4 文档生成系统\n自动生成 README\n自动总结模块功能\n4.5 本地运行能力\n支持 DeepSeek / 本地模型\n数据不出本地\n5. 🧱 产品功能（Features）\n5.1 MVP 功能（必须实现）\n5.1.1 仓库导入\n支持本地路径\n支持 GitHub URL\n5.1.2 文件扫描与过滤\n忽略：\nnode_modules\n.git\nbuild\n5.1.3 代码切分\n按文件 + 函数切分\n支持多语言\n5.1.4 向量索引\nembedding 生成\n存储到 FAISS\n5.1.5 语义检索\n支持 top-k 相似搜索\n5.1.6 AI 问答\n支持代码级问题\n返回答案 + 来源\n5.2 增强功能（P1）\n5.2.1 文档生成\nREADME\n模块说明\n5.2.2 简单 UI\nChat 界面\n文件树\n5.3 高级功能（P2）\n5.3.1 代码关系图\n函数调用关系\n模块依赖\n5.3.2 Agent 能力\n自动代码修改建议\n自动补全功能模块\n6. 🏗️ 系统架构（Architecture）\nFrontend (Next.js)\n        ↓\nFastAPI Backend\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| Code Parser (tree-sitter)\n-------------------------\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| RAG Engine\n| - Embedding\n| - FAISS\n-------------------------\n        ↓\n-------------------------\n| LLM (DeepSeek)\n-------------------------\n7. 🔄 核心流程（Core Flow）\n7.1 索引流程\n导入 repo\n扫描文件\n切分代码\n生成 embedding\n存储向量\n7.2 问答流程\n用户输入问题\n检索相关代码 chunk\n拼接上下文\n调用 LLM\n返回答案 + 来源\n8. 📡 API 设计（简版）\n导入仓库\nPOST /repo/load\n构建索引\nPOST /repo/index\n提问\nPOST /ask\n{\n  \"question\": \"登录逻辑在哪里？\"\n}\n9. 🧠 关键技术方案\n9.1 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）\n向量检索 + LLM 推理\n9.2 代码解析\ntree-sitter 提取结构\n9.3 向量数据库\nFAISS（本地）\n9.4 模型\nDeepSeek API（兼容 OpenAI）\n10. 📊 成功指标（Success Metrics）\n技术指标\n查询响应时间 < 3s\n检索准确率（人工评估）≥ 80%\n产品指标\n能正确回答：\n项目结构问题\n代码定位问题\n开源指标\nGitHub Star\nFork 数\nIssue 活跃度\n11. ⚠️ 非目标（Out of Scope）\n\n当前阶段不做：\n\n多用户系统\n权限控制\n云端部署\n企业级协作\n12. 🗺️ Roadmap\nv0.1（MVP）\nRAG + Q&A\nRepo 导入\nv0.2\n文档生成\nUI\nv0.3\n代码关系图\nv0.4\nAgent 能力\n13. 🧾 技术选型\n模块\t技术\nBackend\tFastAPI\n向量库\tFAISS\nEmbedding\tsentence-transformers\nLLM\tDeepSeek\n解析\ttree-sitter",
    "start_line": 1,
    "end_line": 198
  },

    "content": "✅ 一、开发执行 Checklist（按完成顺序）\n\n你可以直接复制到 GitHub Projects / Notion 使用\n\n🧱 阶段 1：基础搭建（Day 1）\n✅ 基础设施\n 初始化项目结构（backend / core / frontend）\n 创建 requirements.txt\n 配置 .env（DeepSeek API）\n 启动 FastAPI 服务（health check API）\n📂 阶段 2：仓库导入（Day 1-2）\n 支持输入本地路径\n 实现文件递归扫描\n 实现文件过滤规则（.git / node_modules）\n 输出文件列表（JSON）\n 保存 project metadata\n🧠 阶段 3：代码切分（Day 2）\n 读取文件内容\n 实现基础 chunk（按长度）\n 给 chunk 加 metadata（file_path / line）\n 保存 chunk 到本地（json / db）\n\n👉 可选（加分）：\n\n 接入 tree-sitter（函数级切分）\n🔍 阶段 4：向量索引（Day 3）\n 接入 embedding（sentence-transformers）\n 为 chunk 生成 embedding\n 集成 FAISS\n 存储向量索引\n 实现简单 search(query)\n🤖 阶段 5：问答系统（Day 4）\n 实现 /ask API\n query → vector search\n 拼接上下文\n 调用 DeepSeek API\n 返回答案\n\n👉 必做增强：\n\n 返回 source 文件路径\n⚡ 阶段 6：优化体验（Day 5）\n 限制 token 长度\n 优化 top-k 检索策略\n 防止空结果\n 增加错误提示\n📝 阶段 7：文档生成（Day 6）\n 实现 README 生成 prompt\n 支持输入 repo → 输出 README\n 支持 markdown 输出\n🖥️ 阶段 8：简单前端（Day 6-7）\n 输入 repo 路径\n Chat UI（最简单即可）\n 显示回答 + 来源文件\n🚀 阶段 9：开源发布（Day 7）\n 写 README（核心卖点）\n 添加 Demo（gif / 视频）\n 添加架构图\n 上传 GitHub\n🗓️ 二、7天开发计划（真实可执行）\n🧨 Day 1：搭好骨架（不要拖）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 项目能跑\n\n任务\n初始化 FastAPI\n配置依赖\n写 /health API\n建好目录结构\n完成标准\nuvicorn app:app\n\n能访问\n\n🧨 Day 2：拿到代码 + 切分\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 能读取 repo 并切 chunk\n\n任务\n实现本地 repo 导入\n文件扫描\nchunk 切分（先简单）\n完成标准\n\n👉 输出：\n\n[\n  {\n    \"file\": \"app.py\",\n    \"chunk\": \"def login(): ...\"\n  }\n]\n🧨 Day 3：做向量检索\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 能“搜代码”\n\n任务\nembedding\nFAISS index\nsearch(query)\n完成标准\n\n输入：\n\nlogin function\n\n输出：\n👉 返回相关代码 chunk\n\n🧨 Day 4：打通 AI（关键日）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 真正变成 AI 项目\n\n任务\n接入 DeepSeek\n实现 /ask\nRAG流程\n完成标准\n\n输入：\n\n登录逻辑在哪？\n\n输出：\n👉 正确回答 + 文件路径\n\n🧨 Day 5：让结果“靠谱”\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 提升质量（不是乱答）\n\n任务\n优化检索（top-k）\n控制 token\nprompt优化\n完成标准\n\n👉 回答不胡编\n\n🧨 Day 6：做亮点（文档 + UI）\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 可以展示\n\n任务\nREADME生成\n简单前端\n展示回答\n完成标准\n\n👉 可以演示给别人看\n\n🧨 Day 7：开源 + 包装\n\n🎯 目标：\n👉 GitHub 项目上线\n\n任务\n写 README\n加 demo gif\n上传代码\nREADME必须包含：\n🔥 What is this\n🚀 Demo\n💡 Why it's different\n⚡ Quick start",

    "chunk_id": "AGENTS.md:1-93",
    "relative_path": "AGENTS.md",
    "content": "# DevBrain Project Rules\n\n## 🎯 Project Goal\nBuild a local-first AI system that understands codebases using RAG.\n\n---\n\n## 🧱 Architecture Rules\n\n- Use modular architecture:\n  - api/\n  - core/\n  - services/\n  - models/\n\n- Keep business logic inside `core/` and `services/`\n- API layer should be thin (only request/response handling)\n\n---\n\n## ⚙️ Tech Stack Rules\n\n- Backend: FastAPI\n- Vector DB: FAISS\n- Embedding: sentence-transformers\n- LLM: DeepSeek (OpenAI-compatible API)\n- Code parsing: tree-sitter\n\nDO NOT introduce new frameworks unless necessary.\n\n---\n\n## 🧠 RAG Rules\n\n- Always use retrieval before calling LLM\n- Never answer without context from codebase\n- Limit context size to avoid token overflow\n- Prefer function-level chunks over raw text chunks\n\n---\n\n## 📂 Repo Handling Rules\n\n- Ignore directories:\n  - node_modules\n  - .git\n  - build\n  - dist\n\n- Only index relevant files:\n  - .py .ts .js .md .json\n\n---\n\n## 🧾 Code Style\n\n- Write clean, readable, modular code\n- Use type hints (Python typing)\n- Avoid large functions (>50 lines)\n- Use clear naming (no abbreviations)\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 What NOT to do\n\n- Do NOT over-engineer\n- Do NOT add unnecessary abstractions\n- Do NOT rewrite existing working logic\n- Do NOT introduce complex frameworks\n\n---\n\n## 🔁 Workflow Rules\n\n- Always:\n  1. Understand existing code before editing\n  2. Make minimal changes\n  3. Keep consistency with current style\n\n---\n\n## 🧪 Testing Rules\n\n- Ensure core logic is testable\n- Avoid side effects in core modules\n\n---\n\n## 🧩 Future Extensions (Keep in mind)\n\n- Code graph (NetworkX)\n- Agent-based code modification\n- Multi-repo support",
    "start_line": 1,
    "end_line": 93
  },

    "content": "class CodeChunk:\n    \"\"\"A searchable unit produced from source documents.\"\"\"\n\n    chunk_id: str\n    relative_path: str\n    content: str\n    start_line: int\n    end_line: int",

    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:23-32",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def chunk_documents(documents: Iterable[RepoDocument]) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    \"\"\"Chunk repository documents by function blocks when possible.\"\"\"\n\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []\n    for document in documents:\n        produced = _chunk_python_document(document) if document.language == \"python\" else []\n        if not produced:\n            produced = [_chunk_whole_document(document)]\n        chunks.extend(produced)\n    return chunks",
    "start_line": 23,
    "end_line": 32
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:35-61",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def _chunk_python_document(document: RepoDocument) -> list[CodeChunk]:\n    try:\n        tree = ast.parse(document.content)\n    except SyntaxError:\n        return []\n\n    chunks: list[CodeChunk] = []\n    lines = document.content.splitlines()\n    for node in ast.walk(tree):\n        if not isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef, ast.ClassDef)):\n            continue\n        start_line = getattr(node, \"lineno\", 1)\n        end_line = getattr(node, \"end_lineno\", start_line)\n        content = \"\\n\".join(lines[start_line - 1 : end_line]).strip()\n        if not content:\n            continue\n        chunk_id = f\"{document.relative_path}:{start_line}-{end_line}\"\n        chunks.append(\n            CodeChunk(\n                chunk_id=chunk_id,\n                relative_path=document.relative_path,\n                content=content,\n                start_line=start_line,\n                end_line=end_line,\n            )\n        )\n    return sorted(chunks, key=lambda item: (item.relative_path, item.start_line))",
    "start_line": 35,
    "end_line": 61
  },
  {
    "chunk_id": "core/chunking.py:64-73",
    "relative_path": "core/chunking.py",
    "content": "def _chunk_whole_document(document: RepoDocument) -> CodeChunk:\n    lines = document.content.splitlines()\n    end_line = max(len(lines), 1)\n    return CodeChunk(\n        chunk_id=f\"{document.relative_path}:1-{end_line}\",\n        relative_path=document.relative_path,\n        content=document.content,\n        start_line=1,\n        end_line=end_line,\n    )",
    "start_line": 64,
    "end_line": 73
